title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 25 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 25 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 25 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/10/2021
DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate in a day, main contract closed688.5. a increase of 1.7% throughout the day,the price start to go up.The spot quotation in the morning almost kept steady. Most traders gave narrow bargain space, and Steel mills bought on their demands, which resulted in the general deal atmosphere today.
